name: abyssal_lagoon
description: A still black lagoon with no visible bottom. The fish here glow faintly and dissolve within minutes of being caught. Experienced anglers speak of this place in whispers.
note_texts: The water here has no bottom. Strange lights pulse from impossible depths.
Fish pulled from the deep glow faintly and dissolve within minutes. What fed on them?
A torn map marks this lagoon with a single word: 'DO NOT FISH.' No explanation is given.
Something rises to the surface and sinks again. Massive. Ancient. Curious.
The dark water parts. The Abyssal Ruins loom below — vast, alien, and ancient beyond reckoning.
unlock_message: The Abyssal Ruins have surfaced — dive in and confront what dwells in the deep.
